violations.description: Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Drain racks for 3 compartment sinks have not been installed.

Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was not kept clean or maintained. -Hand sink in back prep area is disassembled/unavailable. *Staff have designated the prep sink as a temporary hand sink.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder or bar soap. -Installed soap dispensers are not stocked-using individual pump hand soaps at hand sinks.--Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. -Front paper towel dispenser is empty-loose roll of paper towels being kept above ice maker. -Paper towel dispenser at back kitchen is pulling away from the wall/not well installed.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Seal all raw wood trim around pass-thru window and doorway and hallway in pizza prep area. -Wood trim around pass thru window appears to be raw/unsealed wood. -Hole in wall behind exposed water pipe below small (West) 3 compartment sink. -Floor is not finished/well sealed at floor drain below prep sink. -Possible water damage at flooring near small (West) 3 comp sink. (3 comp sink drain appears to miss the floor drain/overflow to floor when all sinks are draining at same time.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -2 holes are melted into the wall covering at North wall of hot hold service area. -Wall covering behind pizza oven is warped and bubbled.

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. -Pest control poison cubes below back kitchen 3 comp sink and below bathroom hand sink. *Staff disposed of while on-site.

Food display and service. — ---BBQ sauce made on-site kept at counter during service. -Dry Roasted peppers placed in olive oil on site kept at room temperature.--Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 140F or above during display or service. -Pulled pork and brisket in warmer found with temperature of 131F. *Directed to dispose of at end of service today.
